meaning: adj.鏈夊笇鏈涚殑,鏈夊墠閫旂殑
examples: He was voted most promising new director.
She shamed her father into promising more help.
She is among the most promising players in her age group.
We have seen promising positive commitments from the African Union and African leaders on the issue.
And there are plenty more movies on the way that may prove even more promising.
